name: @kestrel-agents/sdk
description: Framework-agnostic TypeScript client for a Kestrel-compatible runner service

scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); rmSync('.tmp-pack', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @kestrel-agents/protocol build && pnpm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.smoke:import: node --input-type=module -e "Promise.all([import('./dist/index.js'), import('./dist/runner.js')]).then(([sdk, runner]) => { sdk.createAgent({ id: 'smoke-agent', profileId: 'reference', target: { kind: 'remote', baseUrl: 'http://127.0.0.1:1' } }); new runner.KestrelClient({ target: { kind: 'remote', baseUrl: 'http://127.0.0.1:1' } }); })"
